claims.message: You claimed the design matches Figma without calling mcp__figma__get_design_context. Verify the design first, then call track_action('figma_verified').
You claimed tests pass without evidence. Run the tests first, then call track_action('tests_passed').
You claimed PR readiness without verifying tests pass and review threads are resolved.
You claimed on-device verification without evidence. Capture the proof first, then call track_action('on_device_verified').

You claimed or provided a build/workflow link without verifying the exact workflow, job, branch, and head SHA first. Verify each item, then track workflow_verified, job_verified, branch_verified, and sha_verified before responding.
